name: Colbun S.A.
summary: Colb√É¬∫n S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, transportation, distribution, and supply of energy, electricity, and natural gas to regulated and unregulated customers in Chile and Peru. It generates electricity through wind, solar, hydro, and thermal energy sources. The company operates 25 generation plants, which have total installed capacity of 3,893 MW, as well as 941 kilometres of transmission lines. It also offers advisory services in the field of engineering. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Las Condes, Chile.
